description: Risk & Compliance (GRC) Super Intelligence Team. Named real-world personas across 7 cells. Built local-first (LM Studio) and validator-gated. Illustrative composites; see DISCLAIMER.md.

privacy-data-protection.description: Privacy law, data protection, GDPR/CCPA, privacy-by-design.

ai-governance-responsible-ai.description: AI governance, responsible AI, algorithmic accountability, EU AI Act / NIST RMF.

regulatory-tech-policy.description: Tech regulation, antitrust, platform policy, algorithmic-accountability journalism/law.

security-governance.description: Security governance, disclosure, threat policy (cross-listed from Engineering).

erm-grc-leadership.description: Enterprise risk management, GRC frameworks, internal audit, three-lines model.

model-systemic-risk.description: Model risk, validation (SR 11-7), systemic/financial-stability risk (cross-listed from Trading).
